mapper.select: SELECT COMPATIBILITY_DECLARATION_ID AS compatibilityDeclarationId, BUILDER_VERSION AS builderVersion, BUILDER_RULE_PACK_VERSION AS builderRulePackVersion, TEMPLATE_PACK_VERSION AS templatePackVersion, SUPPORTED_SOURCE_CONTRACT_RANGE AS supportedSourceContractRange, SUPPORTED_OVERLAY_SCHEMA_RANGE AS supportedOverlaySchemaRange, EMITTED_MANIFEST_CONTRACT_VERSION AS emittedManifestContractVersion, EMITTED_AUTHORITY_CONTRACT_VERSION AS emittedAuthorityContractVersion, RELEASE_COMPATIBILITY_VERSION AS releaseCompatibilityVersion, BREAKING_CHANGE_YN AS breakingChangeYn, COMPATIBILITY_VERDICT AS compatibilityVerdict, STATUS AS status FROM BUILDER_COMPATIBILITY_DECLARATION ORDER BY BUILDER_VERSION ASC

SELECT MIGRATION_PLAN_ID AS migrationPlanId, FROM_BUILDER_VERSION AS fromBuilderVersion, TO_BUILDER_VERSION AS toBuilderVersion, FROM_SOURCE_CONTRACT_RANGE AS fromSourceContractRange, TO_SOURCE_CONTRACT_RANGE AS toSourceContractRange, FROM_OVERLAY_SCHEMA_RANGE AS fromOverlaySchemaRange, TO_OVERLAY_SCHEMA_RANGE AS toOverlaySchemaRange, MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED_YN AS manualReviewRequiredYn, STATUS AS status FROM BUILDER_MIGRATION_PLAN ORDER BY FROM_BUILDER_VERSION ASC, TO_BUILDER_VERSION ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BUILDER_COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN ( COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID, PROJECT_ID, BUILDER_VERSION, BUILDER_RULE_PACK_VERSION, TEMPLATE_PACK_VERSION, SOURCE_CONTRACT_VERSION, OVERLAY_SCHEMA_VERSION, OVERLAY_SET_ID, MIGRATION_PLAN_ID, CHECK_SCOPE, COMPATIBILITY_VERDICT, BLOCKING_ISSUE_COUNT, STARTED_AT, COMPLETED_AT, REQUESTED_BY ) VALUES ( #{compatibilityCheckRunId}, #{projectId}, #{builderVersion}, #{builderRulePackVersion}, #{templatePackVersion}, #{sourceContractVersion}, #{overlaySchemaVersion}, #{overlaySetId}, #{migrationPlanId}, #{checkScope}, #{compatibilityVerdict}, #{blockingIssueCount}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{requestedBy} )

INSERT INTO BUILDER_COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RESULT ( COMPATIBILITY_RESULT_ID, COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID, RESULT_TYPE, TARGET_SCOPE, TARGET_KEY, SEVERITY, RULE_CODE, SUMMARY, DETAILS_JSON, BLOCKING_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{compatibilityResultId}, #{compatibilityCheckRunId}, #{resultType}, #{targetScope}, #{targetKey}, #{severity}, #{ruleCode}, #{summary}, #{detailsJson}, #{blockingYn}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID AS compatibilityCheckRunId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, BUILDER_VERSION AS builderVersion, BUILDER_RULE_PACK_VERSION AS builderRulePackVersion, TEMPLATE_PACK_VERSION AS templatePackVersion, SOURCE_CONTRACT_VERSION AS sourceContractVersion, OVERLAY_SCHEMA_VERSION AS overlaySchemaVersion, OVERLAY_SET_ID AS overlaySetId, MIGRATION_PLAN_ID AS migrationPlanId, CHECK_SCOPE AS checkScope, COMPATIBILITY_VERDICT AS compatibilityVerdict, BLOCKING_ISSUE_COUNT AS blockingIssueCount, STARTED_AT AS startedAt, COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt, REQUESTED_BY AS requestedBy FROM BUILDER_COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN WHERE COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID = #{value}

SELECT COMPATIBILITY_RESULT_ID AS compatibilityResultId, COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID AS compatibilityCheckRunId, RESULT_TYPE AS resultType, TARGET_SCOPE AS targetScope, TARGET_KEY AS targetKey, SEVERITY AS severity, RULE_CODE AS ruleCode, SUMMARY AS summary, DETAILS_JSON AS detailsJson, BLOCKING_YN AS blockingYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM BUILDER_COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RESULT WHERE COMPATIBILITY_CHECK_RUN_ID = #{value} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC, COMPATIBILITY_RESULT_ID ASC
